plant.description: Red and black seeds are highly toxic if not purified.

method_1.method: Seeds must be boiled in cow's milk for 3-6 hours (Shodhana).

medicinal_uses: Used specifically for hair growth and scalp infections.
Assists in neurological pains in very small doses.

safety_profile.warning: RAW SEEDS ARE DEADLY POISONOUS. NEVER USE WITHOUT EXPERT PURIFICATION.
safety_profile.medical_supervision: Use under the guidance of a qualified Ayurvedic practitioner.

plant_profile.note: AI estimated profile based on known properties
